options.name: progression_balancing
options.description:
A system that can move progression earlier, to try and prevent the player from getting stuck and bored early.

A lower setting means more getting stuck. A higher setting means less getting stuck.

options.name: accessibility
options.description:
Set rules for reachability of your items/locations.

**Full:** ensure everything can be reached and acquired.

**Minimal:** ensure what is needed to reach your goal can be acquired.

options.name: objective
options.description: Determines what is the objective of the run.

options.name: require_mining
options.display_name: Require Mining for the Radioactive Capsule
options.description: Determines if the Radioactive Capsule can be dug out or needs to be crafted.

options.name: survive_day
options.description: Determines the day you need to survive to if the objective is Survive.

options.name: local_items
options.description: Forces these items to be in their native world.
options: Christmas decoration (two candles in a wreath)
Christmas decoration (three candles in a wreath)

options.name: non_local_items
options.description: Forces these items to be outside their native world.
options: Christmas decoration (two candles in a wreath)
Christmas decoration (three candles in a wreath)

options.name: start_inventory
options.description: Start with the specified amount of these items. Example: "Bomb: 1"
options: Christmas decoration (two candles in a wreath)
Christmas decoration (three candles in a wreath)

options.name: start_hints
options.description: Start with these item's locations prefilled into the ``!hint`` command.
options: Christmas decoration (two candles in a wreath)
Christmas decoration (three candles in a wreath)

options.name: start_location_hints
options.description: Start with these locations and their item prefilled into the ``!hint`` command.
options: Purchase cool funy sweden man (real) (no fake)
Purchase cool funy ctuhu man (real) (no fake)
Purchase cool funy banana moth (real) (no fake)
Purchase cool funy glass cat (real) (no fake)

options.name: exclude_locations
options.description: Prevent these locations from having an important item.
options: Purchase cool funy sweden man (real) (no fake)
Purchase cool funy ctuhu man (real) (no fake)
Purchase cool funy banana moth (real) (no fake)
Purchase cool funy glass cat (real) (no fake)

options.name: priority_locations
options.description: Prevent these locations from having an unimportant item.
options: Purchase cool funy sweden man (real) (no fake)
Purchase cool funy ctuhu man (real) (no fake)
Purchase cool funy banana moth (real) (no fake)
Purchase cool funy glass cat (real) (no fake)

options.name: item_links
options.description: Share part of your item pool with other players.

options.name: plando_items
options.description: Generic items plando.

options.name: day_as_items
options.description: Determines if you need to unlock days as items.

options.name: scrap_recipes_as_items
options.description: Determines if you need to unlock scrap recipes as items.

options.name: upgrades_as_items
options.description: Determines if specific upgrades will be created as items.

options.name: physical_modules_as_items
options.description: Determines if physical modules will be created as items.

options.name: atv_upgrades_as_items
options.description: Determines if ATV upgrades will be created as items.

options.name: only_bonus_points
options.description:
Determines if filler items will only be Bonus Points.
Traps will still be generated based on the trap chance.

options.name: bonus_points_amount
options.description: Determines the amount of points the Bonus Points filler item will give.

options.name: survive_days_locations
options.description:
Determines the maximum day to create "Survive Day N" location for.
0 will generate none.
NOTE: If the objective is Survive, the goal day is used instead.

options.name: signal_locations
options.description:
Determines the number of "Sell Level N Signal" locations to create, one for each signal level.
0 will generate none.

options.name: backwards_signal_levels
options.description:
Determines if selling a signal also gives you a location for all the levels underneath.
For example, selling a level 2 signal would also give a level 0 and level 1 location.

options.name: daily_task_locations
options.description:
Determines the number of "Daily Task Done" locations to create.
0 will generate none.

options.name: fuse_replacement_locations
options.description:
Determines the number of "Replace Fuse" locations to create.
0 will generate none.

options.name: server_repair_locations
options.description:
Determines the number of "Repair Server" locations to create.
0 will generate none.

options.name: transformer_repair_locations
options.description:
Determines the number of "Repair Transformer" locations to create.
0 will generate none.

options.name: trash_bags_locations
options.description:
Determines the number of "Sell 10 Full Trash Bags" locations to create.
0 will generate none.

options.name: maintenance_tasks
options.description: Determines if maintenance advancements are locations.

options.name: cooking_tasks
options.description: Determines if cooking advancements are locations.

options.name: shop_items
options.description: Determines if purchasing shop items are locations.

options.name: chicken_sandwiches
options.description: Determines if the chicken sandwiches are included as locations.

options.name: buried_items
options.description:
Determines if items that require digging out are included as locations.
Locations required by the objective are always enabled (Example: the ball joints for Kerfur-Omega)

options.name: time_sensitive
options.description: Determines if locations that are in-game-time-sensitive are enabled.

options.name: funny_setting
options.description: Determines if items that require the "funny setting" are included as locations and items.

options.name: argemia_plushes
options.description:
Determines what argemia plushes are present as locations.
None: No Argemia plushes
RGB: Only the Red, Green, and Blue Argemia plushes
RGBYCM: All the Argemia plushes except the nuclear ones (adds an item to get the "lifecrystal" signal)
All: All the Argemia plushes

options.name: kerfur_omega_enabled
options.description:
Determines if Kerfur-Omega locations and items should be enabled, even if it's not the objective.
Does not include the final location.

options.name: hell_rock_enabled
options.display_name: Hell Rock Items and Locations Enabled
options.description:
Determines if Hell Rock locations and items should be enabled, even if it's not the objective.
Does not include the final location.

options.name: lambert_plush_enabled
options.display_name: Lambert Plush Items and Locations Enabled
options.description:
Determines if Lambert Plush locations and items should be enabled, even if it's not the objective.
Does not include the final location.

options.name: green_cabinet_enabled
options.display_name: Green Cabinet Items and Locations Enabled
options.description:
Determines if Green Cabinet locations and items should be enabled, even if it's not the objective.
Does not include the final location.

options.name: trap_chance
options.description:
Determines the chance for any junk item to become a trap.
Set it to 0 for no traps.
